articles.title: Recent homes sales in Greater Boston (May 27)
articles.description:
ABINGTON 28 Linda St. One-family ranch, built in 1951, 960 square feet, 7 rooms, 2 bedrooms, 1 bath, on 7,350-square-foot lot. $455,000 56 Townsend St. #26 Condo. $305,000 ACTON 5 Perkins Lane. One-family Colonial, built in 1995, 3,076 square feet, 10 rooms, 4 bedrooms, 3 baths, on 23,704-square-foot lot. $1,266,000 8 Highland Road. One-family Colonial, […]

The post Recent homes sales in Greater Boston (May 27) appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Abington home at 28 Linda St. sold for $455,000 on May 27.
Acton Colonial at 5 Perkins Lane sold for $1,266,000, reflecting rising property values.
Local residents face increased housing costs as sales prices continue to climb.
